THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, DOUGLAS G AMAYA, PAUL AMAYA, HELEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STUCK, DICK (AKA RICHARD STUCK) $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $699.55 INTEREST, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,756.55, THIS IS FOR PLT. DOUGLAS G MARTIN. THERE ARE TWO SEPARATE JUDGMENT. SECOND JUDGMENT FOR PLT.(PAUL & HELEN AMAYA) AGAINST DICK STUCK AKA RICHARD STUCK IN THE AMOUNT OF $5756.55
